noServerDescription: Add a RabbitMQ server connection to view and manage queues across your clusters.
selectServerPrompt: Please select a RabbitMQ server to view queues
queueNotFoundDesc: Please select a server and queue to view details.
notFoundMessage: The queue "{{queueName}}" could not be found.
deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the queue "{{queueName}}"? This action cannot be undone and will permanently remove the queue and all its messages.
